title: F5 security advisory (AV26-612)
description: On June 17, 2026, F5 published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: F5 WAF for NGINX Instance Manager - versions 5.9.0 to 5.13.1
NGINX App Protect DoS - versions 4.3.0 to 4.7.0
NGINX App Protect WAF - versions 5.2.0 to 5.8.0 and 4.10.0 to 4.16.0
NGINX Open Source - versions 1.30.0 to 1.30.2 and 1.31.0 to 1.31.1
NGINX Plus - version 37.0.0 R33 to 37.01 R36
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
